# backgroundNoiseOffset

**Instance Property**

The white noise variance estimate in the background noise signal.

## Declaration

```swift
let backgroundNoiseOffset: Double
```

## Discussion

This value represents the white noise variance estimate per Hz in the [doc://com.apple.sensorkit/documentation/SensorKit/SRPhotoplethysmogramOpticalSample/NoiseTerms-swift.struct/backgroundNoise] signal (Normalized Units²/Hz). Apply the noise equivalent bandwidth factor to account for in-band noise for your setup.

## Accessing noise terms

- **whiteNoise**: An estimate of the white noise of the sensor.
- **pinkNoise**: An estimate of the pink noise of the sensor.
- **backgroundNoise**: An estimated timeseries of ambient noise intrusion.
